title: Per-work-unit-kind context contract substrate missing — no way to declare which relation_types compose the execution bundle for each unit kind
description: DEC-0017 specifies per-unit-kind context contract: implementation tasks need conventions + acceptance + architecture-touched; decision-making tasks need rationale + alternatives + related-decisions; verification tasks need verification-criteria + evidence-rules + items-under-verification. Today the substrate has NO mechanism to declare per-unit-kind which relation_types compose the execution bundle. gather-execution-context (FGAP-031) cannot dispatch correctly without reading the contract for the unit-kind being executed.

evidence.reference: No context-contract.schema.json; no schema declaring per-kind bundle composition. Existing schemas (config, tasks, phase, decisions, etc.) carry the unit-kind data but no kind-to-bundle mapping.

ConfigBlock declares lenses[] (composition lens machinery from FGAP-012 closure exists); the context-contract could plausibly encode AS composition lenses keyed by unit-kind, OR as a new context-contract block kind. Decision deferred to FGAP-030 closure work.

impact: Without per-unit-kind context contract, gather-execution-context cannot know what to gather for a given unit. Either gather returns everything (bundle pollution; defeats relevance scoping) or returns nothing (no contract = nothing to bundle). The substrate has no extensibility path for new unit-kinds without code changes — same antipattern as FGAP-013's pre-DEC-0013 hardcoded status vocabulary.
proposed_resolution: Two coherent implementation shapes — closure work decides which: (a) NEW BLOCK KIND: context-contract.json with schema declaring per-kind { unitKind: string, bundle_relation_types: { in: string[], out: string[], depth: number, applicability_predicate?: string }[] }. Authoring contract per unit-kind is opt-in via /context install (default contracts ship in registry/blocks/). (b) COMPOSITION-LENS ENCODING: context contracts encoded in config.lenses[] as kind='execution-context-bundle' lenses keyed by unit-kind. Reuses FGAP-012 closure machinery. Either is DEC-0017 compliant. (b) is simpler but less explicit; (a) is more explicit but adds a block kind. Closure work picks one + documents rationale.
